title: papaver dubium subsp. glabrum
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. glabrum, also known as the smooth poppy or glabrous poppy, is a subspecies of the poppy plant, characterized by its smooth leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as protopine and sanguinarine. The health benefits of Papaver dubium subsp. glabrum include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy that can be used to address a range of health concerns.
